# Format: `docs/project.md` (auto-generated manifest)

Auto-generated at each `sync_project`. **Entire file is app-owned** — edits overwritten on next sync. No marker block (unlike `CLAUDE.md` section) because the whole file is managed.

## Sections (fixed order)

```markdown
# <project name>

<project description or blank>

**Project type:** 📁 Standard | ⚙ Microservice

## Repositories

| Repository | Role | Path | GitHub |
|------------|------|------|--------|
| ... rows ... |

## Connected microservices

- **<name>** — server repo: <display-name>  (or _No connected microservices._)

## Parent projects

- <name>  (or _No parent projects._)

---
_Auto-generated by Solo Dev Hub. Do not edit manually — changes will be overwritten on next sync._
```

## LLM / AI policy

LLM **must not** edit `docs/project.md`. It's a snapshot view for humans / LLM read-only context. All changes to its content come from modifying project/repo records via the app.

## Why it exists

Gives LLM a compact single-source-of-truth view of the project structure without traversing the whole repo tree or running git across sibling repos.
